data.body: df83 COMMITTED 1d7e903da (Change-Id Ia33f339, rebar-ticket + DCO trailers present), rebased onto origin/main@5e1a59491. RHYTHM: full make test is 18min so per-story = targeted tests + lint + typecheck (fast); CI Verified+1 is the authoritative full-suite gate. Baseline full-suite green established for df83 (5313 pass, 1 unrelated local-venv grounding-test failure). Discovered bug 4c6c (fsck Check3 same TOCTOU) filed+linked. Stack order: gitutil chain (df83->bdbe->8368), lock chain (df7b->8f43->2202->b1ea), applier (8111), then independent test-only (b6c5,75d9,d5f0,799f,e4cf,6b2c,003d,eba0,283e,5f39,7f1b,003d). Moving to bdbe.
